Back to Admin
WORKER WORKSPACE
Borivoje Cvetković Worker Test

Keep your profile complete, verify documents, activate Job Finder, and follow your queue status in one workspace.

COMPLETE
Complete Your Profile

Fill in all required fields to unlock Job Finder. Once your profile reaches 100%, you can activate the service and start receiving job matches.

MISSING FIELDS

Birth City
Citizenship

+9 more
Complete Profile
Profile

Update your personal details and passport data.

Documents

Upload or review passport, biometric photo, and diploma.

Queue

Track payment, queue status, and any active offer.

SUPPORT INBOX
Support unlocks after Job Finder payment
